title: Golfers play for meaty prizes
description: GOLF NEWS - The annual Bokkedag Golf...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - The annual Bokkedag Golf Competition was well attended by players who battled it out on the golf course for delectable venison prizes.","html":"GOLF NEWS - The annual Bokkedag Golf Competition was well attended by players who battled it out on the golf course for delectable venison prizes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Golfers stood to win kudu, impala, waterbuck or springbuck meat during the Two Ball Better Ball competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Players teed off at 12:00 and after the day's play it was time for the prizegiving ceremony followed by a dinner.","html":"Players teed off at 12:00 and after the day's play it was time for the prizegiving ceremony followed by a dinner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results:","html":"Results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• IPS","html":"• IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["Yvonne Drummond 36.","Frikkie Coetzee 35.","Niek Steyn 34"],"ordered":true},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Bokkedag Two Ball Better Ball","html":"• Bokkedag Two Ball Better Ball"},{"type":"list","items":["Neil Dodds and Chris Lee 41.","Donovan Arries and Godwin Bosch 40.","Johnny Ludick and Dan Yeadon 40."],"ordered":true},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Two Clubs","html":"• Two Clubs"},{"type":"list","items":["Donovan Arries, Robert Hobson and Patrick Ludick."],"ordered":true},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Derek Light","html":"Derek Light"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Colin Warner","html":"Colin Warner"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jacko Venter","html":"Jacko Venter"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
